SELECT 
    p.People_ID
FROM 
    people AS p
INNER JOIN 
    perpetrator AS pr
ON 
    p.People_ID = pr.People_ID
WHERE 
    p.Name = 'Tyrone Brayan'
GROUP BY 
    p.People_ID
HAVING 
    SUM(pr.Injured) <= 16
